Departments

Psychology Department

MENU

Our research areas range from migration, discrimination, leadership, perfectionism to parental attitudes, psychometrics, and trauma. Students can choose between various Area Elective courses in the fields of social, clinical, industrial, developmental and experimental psychology. We provide a comprehensive academic and pastoral support for our students.

Our department is also keen to provide high-quality graduate programs in Clinical and Developmental Psychology because we are aware that various fields of psychology require further specialisation and training after undergraduate studies. Our programs receive hundreds of applications each year and admissions are competitive.
